metadata.rationale: Die zentrale Spielchronik wird als gesicherter Tatsachenbericht präsentiert, obwohl die behaupteten Matchdetails und ihre Dramaturgie nicht verlässlich belegt sind und in dieser Ausformung als frei konstruierte Erzählung erscheinen. Zusätzlich werden synthetische sowie generische Bilder so eingebunden, als belegten sie genau dieses konkrete 2:2 und den geschilderten Schockmoment.

Analysis of the news text against the provided image reveals a direct contradiction. The text explicitly describes the image as a "weitwinkelaufnahme der VELTINS-Arena kurz vor Spielbeginn" (wide shot of the stadium before kickoff) featuring full stands ("dichtes Gedränge... Tribünen in Blau und Weiß"). However, the provided image clearly shows a close-up action shot of a single player (wearing a Schalke 04 kit) dribbling the ball during a match, with blurred stadium background but no view of the stands or pre-match crowd. The text caption "Volles Haus in Gelsenkirchen" is false for this specific image file. Furthermore, the text contains major factual errors claiming Edin Džeko will play for Schalke in the 2026 2. Bundesliga season, which is implausible. The image does not verify the text's claims.

The news text includes placeholders for four specific images (wide shot before kickoff, celebration at 2:0 penalty, close-up of a player with crossed arms, scoreboard inside arena). The provided image shows a single player dribbling the ball, which does not match any of the four image descriptions provided in the text ('Bild: ...'). Specifically, it is not a wide shot of the arena, nor the 2:0 celebration, nor a static scoreboard shot.
